name: SupplyCore Operational Intelligence
description: Business-facing intelligence perspective for the SupplyCore knowledge graph. Renames raw labels to domain language, curates visible properties, constrains exploration to signal-rich edges, and ships a library of natural-language search phrases that translate to bounded Cypher traversals. Import via Bloom → Perspectives → Import.

categories.label: HotBattle
categories.description: Recent, high-intensity battle tagged by the Bloom entry-point job.

categories.label: HighRiskPilot
categories.description: Pilot above suspicion threshold tagged by the Bloom entry-point job.

categories.label: StrategicSystem
categories.description: System with sustained recent battle density tagged by the Bloom entry-point job.

categories.label: HotAlliance
categories.description: Alliance with recent engagement volume tagged by the Bloom entry-point job.

explorationLimits.notes: Dense edges (CO_OCCURS_WITH, SAME_FLEET) must be filtered by weight or time window to stay performant. See search phrases for safe templates.

searchPhrases.name: Find pilot
searchPhrases.description: Locate a pilot by name fragment.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (p:Character) WHERE toLower(p.name) CONTAINS toLower($name) RETURN p ORDER BY COALESCE(p.suspicion_score, 0) DESC LIMIT 50

searchPhrases.name: Find alliance
searchPhrases.description: Locate an alliance by name fragment.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (a:Alliance) WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS toLower($name) RETURN a LIMIT 50

searchPhrases.name: Show hot engagements
searchPhrases.description: Display recent high-intensity battles tagged by the entry-point job.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (b:HotBattle) WITH b ORDER BY b.bloom_hot_score DESC LIMIT 50 OPTIONAL MATCH (b)-[:IN_SYSTEM|LOCATED_IN]->(s:System) RETURN b, s

searchPhrases.name: Show high-risk pilots
searchPhrases.description: Display pilots currently above the suspicion threshold.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (p:HighRiskPilot) WITH p ORDER BY COALESCE(p.suspicion_score_recent, p.suspicion_score, 0) DESC LIMIT 50 OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:MEMBER_OF_ALLIANCE]->(a:Alliance) RETURN p, a

searchPhrases.name: Show strategic systems
searchPhrases.description: Display systems with sustained recent engagement density.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (s:StrategicSystem) WITH s ORDER BY s.bloom_recent_battle_count DESC LIMIT 50 RETURN s

searchPhrases.name: Battles in system
searchPhrases.description: Find battles that occurred in a specific solar system within the last 30 days.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (s:System) WHERE toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower($system) WITH s MATCH (b:Battle)-[:IN_SYSTEM|LOCATED_IN]->(s) WHERE b.started_at >= apoc.date.format(datetime() - duration('P30D'), 'ms', 'yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss\'Z\'') RETURN b, s ORDER BY b.started_at DESC LIMIT 100

searchPhrases.name: Battles in region
searchPhrases.description: Find battles that occurred anywhere in a specific region within the last 14 days.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (r:Region) WHERE toLower(r.name) CONTAINS toLower($region) WITH r MATCH (b:Battle)-[:IN_SYSTEM|LOCATED_IN]->(:System)-[:IN_CONSTELLATION]->(:Constellation)-[:IN_REGION]->(r) WHERE b.started_at >= apoc.date.format(datetime() - duration('P14D'), 'ms', 'yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss\'Z\'') RETURN b, r ORDER BY b.started_at DESC LIMIT 100

searchPhrases.name: Alliances active in system
searchPhrases.description: List alliances that participated in battles in a given system within the last 30 days.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (s:System) WHERE toLower(s.name) CONTAINS toLower($system) WITH s MATCH (b:Battle)-[:IN_SYSTEM|LOCATED_IN]->(s) WHERE b.started_at >= apoc.date.format(datetime() - duration('P30D'), 'ms', 'yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss\'Z\'') MATCH (p:Character)-[:PARTICIPATED_IN]->(b) MATCH (p)-[:MEMBER_OF_ALLIANCE]->(a:Alliance) RETURN DISTINCT a, count(DISTINCT b) AS battles ORDER BY battles DESC LIMIT 50

searchPhrases.name: Pilots who flew with
searchPhrases.description: Show pilots frequently co-occurring with a target pilot (top 25 by recent weight).
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (p:Character) WHERE toLower(p.name) CONTAINS toLower($name) WITH p LIMIT 1 MATCH (p)-[r:CO_OCCURS_WITH]-(other:Character) WHERE COALESCE(r.recent_weight, r.weight, 0) > 0 RETURN p, r, other ORDER BY COALESCE(r.recent_weight, r.weight, 0) DESC LIMIT 25

searchPhrases.name: Co-occurrence with hostile alliance
searchPhrases.description: Find pilots who flew alongside members of a hostile alliance.
searchPhrases.phrase: Find pilots who flew with alliance $alliance
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (a:Alliance) WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS toLower($alliance) WITH a LIMIT 1 MATCH (p:Character)-[:CO_OCCURS_WITH]-(hostile:Character)-[:MEMBER_OF_ALLIANCE]->(a) WITH p, count(DISTINCT hostile) AS overlap ORDER BY overlap DESC LIMIT 50 RETURN p, overlap

searchPhrases.name: Doctrine usage
searchPhrases.description: Expand a doctrine to its fits and the pilots who flew them.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (d:Doctrine) WHERE toLower(d.name) CONTAINS toLower($name) WITH d LIMIT 1 MATCH (d)-[:USES]->(f:Fit) OPTIONAL MATCH (f)-[:CONTAINS]->(i:Item) RETURN d, f, i LIMIT 250

searchPhrases.name: Alliance relationships
searchPhrases.description: Show the allied/hostile graph around a specific alliance.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (a:Alliance) WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS toLower($name) WITH a LIMIT 1 OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[r1:ALLIED_WITH]-(ally:Alliance) OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-[r2:HOSTILE_TO]-(enemy:Alliance) RETURN a, r1, ally, r2, enemy LIMIT 100

searchPhrases.name: Threat corridor
searchPhrases.description: Walk the gate graph between two systems (≤ 10 jumps).
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (a:System), (b:System) WHERE toLower(a.name) = toLower($from) AND toLower(b.name) = toLower($to) MATCH path = shortestPath((a)-[:CONNECTS_TO*..10]-(b)) RETURN path LIMIT 1

searchPhrases.name: Explain suspicion
searchPhrases.description: Starting from a suspect, pull co-occurrence, anomaly associations and side-crossings to justify the score.
searchPhrases.cypher: MATCH (p:Character) WHERE toLower(p.name) CONTAINS toLower($name) WITH p LIMIT 1 OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[r1:CO_OCCURS_WITH]-(peer:Character) WITH p, r1, peer ORDER BY COALESCE(r1.recent_weight, 0) DESC LIMIT 15 OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[r2:ASSOCIATED_WITH_ANOMALY]->(b:Battle) OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[r3:CROSSED_SIDES]-(other:Character) RETURN p, r1, peer, r2, b, r3, other

notes: This perspective is an operator-facing projection — it hides BattleSide / Cohort / ComputeCheckpoint plumbing nodes so analysts see a clean domain model.

Entry-point labels (HotBattle, HighRiskPilot, StrategicSystem, HotAlliance) are maintained by the compute_bloom_entry_points job. If they are missing, the 'Show ...' phrases will return nothing until the job runs.
Search phrases referencing apoc.date.format require APOC to be available in Neo4j. If APOC is disabled, rewrite those phrases with literal timestamps from your session.
Exploration limits reflect dense-edge reality (CO_OCCURS_WITH, SAME_FLEET). Do NOT raise maxExpandDepth above 2 without filtering by weight or time window first.
